Journal.Title: International journal of health policy and management

Article.ArticleTitle: The Pill is Mightier Than the Sword.

Abstract.AbstractText: One determinant of peace is the role of women in society. Some studies suggest that a young age structure, also known as a "youth bulge" can facilitate conflict. Population growth and age structure are factors amenable to change in a human rights context. We propose that policies which favor voluntary family planning and the education of women can ameliorate the global burden of disease associated with conflict and terrorism.
Abstract.CopyrightInformation: © 2015 by Kerman University of Medical Sciences.
